# Competency Questions

## Who is the operator and what role does the AI take? #cq #identity

The ontology should answer, from `identity.md`, that the operator is a solo founder
and the AI is the primary builder reporting to them.

## What is the current launch priority? #cq #direction

The ontology should state, from `direction.md`, the priority of shipping the first
paid feature and keeping the stack boring.

## Which product app and repository does a lane touch? #cq #projects

The ontology should answer, from `projects.md`, that there is one product
application and one repository the founder owns.
